name: User-Created Content
attribution: Created by the local Chronicle user.
notes: Default source for personal notes, prayers, reflections, and manually curated tags.

name: English Standard Version Display Source
attribution: Scripture quotations are from the ESV Bible (The Holy Bible, English Standard Version), copyright 2001 by Crossway. Used by permission. All rights reserved.

attribution: The SWORD Project / CrossWire Bible Society KJV module.
notes: SWORD KJV module with Strong's Numbers and morphology metadata.

name: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary on the Whole Bible
attribution: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary, prepared from Christian Classics Ethereal Library text and distributed by CrossWire.

name: Treasury of Scripture Knowledge
attribution: Treasury of Scripture Knowledge, distributed by CrossWire.

name: Jamieson-Fausset-Brown Commentary
attribution: Robert Jamieson, A. R. Fausset, and David Brown, Commentary Critical and Explanatory on the Whole Bible, CCEL electronic edition.
notes: Public-domain HTML commentary archive from CCEL.

name: STEPBible Data Repository
attribution: Tyndale House Cambridge / STEPBible.org data repository.
notes: CC BY 4.0 lexicon and original-language datasets.

name: HelloAOLab American Standard Version
attribution: American Standard Version (1901), local JSON from HelloAOLab Free Use Bible API.
notes: Installed by scripts/install-offline-bibles.mjs from translation id eng_asv.

name: HelloAOLab King James Version
attribution: King James Version, local JSON from HelloAOLab Free Use Bible API.
notes: Installed by scripts/install-offline-bibles.mjs from translation id eng_kjv.

name: Bible SDK API
notes: External API candidate for Strong's Concordance and semantic search; terms should be reviewed before production use.

name: Historical Christian Faith Commentaries Database
notes: Patristic and historical commentary excerpts normalized into Chronicle's local study library.

name: kjvstudy.org Local Study Data
notes: Cross references, Strong's-linked interlinear tokens, word studies, and verse commentary imported into Chronicle.

name: Bibleistika Scraper and Encoding Reference
notes: Secondary comparison source for encoded cross references and Strong's concordance scraping patterns.

name: Chronicle Curated Data
notes: Use for manually reviewed theme tags, reasons, and graph relationships authored by the user.
